note: Routing cases for loop-shaped work. One-shot commands and direct domain tasks bypass this router.

evals.prompt: 幫我做一次 docs-vs-code audit，找到漂移後整理修正順序。
evals.expected_output: ROUTE. This is an audit loop; using-workflows selects docs-vs-code-audit and preserves evidence through the loop.

evals.prompt: 請另一個模型針對這一份 migration plan 給出 PASS 或 BLOCK。
evals.expected_output: ROUTE. A bounded second-model verdict on one artifact selects consensus-gate.

evals.prompt: 先把這個 feature 規劃好，核准後實作，再做獨立驗證。
evals.expected_output: ROUTE. The request is a plan-to-build lifecycle with an approval seam and verification stage.

evals.prompt: 幫我跑 npm test，回報 exit code。
evals.expected_output: NO ROUTE. A single known command is handled inline.

evals.prompt: 重新設計 checkout 頁面的視覺和互動。
evals.expected_output: NO ROUTE through using-workflows. The primary goal is visual design; enter using-design-skills directly.

evals.prompt: 這個 function 為什麼偶爾丟 TypeError？先幫我診斷原因。
evals.expected_output: NO ROUTE unless the investigation grows into a repeated audit loop. Start with diagnosing-bugs inline.
